'''Tirahnn''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tirahnn/Legends|Tirahnn]]. Larger than some countries, it hosted the [[Great Fair]] and was the trading nexus of the entire [[Zeemacht Cluster/Legends|Zeemacht Cluster]].

{{City-stub}}
